name: 4K-AMZ - The CEO Club (2026) (CA)
plot: Dive deep into the world of seven trailblazing female CEOs (Serena Williams, Thalia, Dee Ocleppo Hilfiger, Loren Ridinger, Winnie Harlow, Hannah Bronfman, and Isabela Rangel Grutman) as they navigate the triumphs and challenges of both their professional and personal lives. Redefining what it means to lead in today's world, these women enter the next phase of their careers with confidence and clarity forged by life experiences.
cast: Serena Williams, Thalia, Dee Ocleppo Hilfiger, Loren Ridinger, Winnie Harlow, Hannah Bronfman, Isabela Rangel Grutman

name: 4K-AMZ - Hollywood Hustler: Glitz, Glam, Scam (2025) (US)
plot: The meteoric rise and catastrophic fall of Zach Horowitz, a wannabe actor, on his journey from Indiana to Los Angeles as he orchestrates one of Hollywood's most audacious financial frauds. Obsessed with achieving A-list status despite his limited talent on screen, Zach convinces his university friends with finance backgrounds to join his business ventures with fabricated backings from powerful CEOs.

name: 4K-AMZ - Shiny Happy People (2023) (US)
plot: A limited docuseries exposing the truth beneath the wholesome Americana surface of reality tv’s favorite mega-family, The Duggars, and the radical organization behind them: The Institute in Basic Life Principles. As details of the family and their scandals unfold, we realize they’re part of an insidious, much larger threat already in motion, with democracy itself in peril.
cast: Amy King, Dillon King

name: 4K-AMZ - Courtois, the Return of the Number 1 (2024) (ES)
plot: A portrait that shows the spectacular work of Thibaut Courtois to reach the decisive stretch of the season after the serious injury suffered just before the start of LaLiga. We will experience the uncertainty of undergoing surgery, the sacrifice he made to get back to his best, his day-to-day life with Mishel, his children and family, his intense schedule and other previously unknown facets.
cast: Thibaut Courtois

name: 4K-AMZ - ROMCON: Who the F**k Is Jason Porter? (2025) (CA)
plot: Discover how Toronto real estate broker Heather Rovet's perfect romance with "Jace" shattered upon discovering he was Jason Porter, a convicted felon with a history of romantic fraud. Connecting with other victims, Heather transforms from heartbroken lover to determined investigator, risking everything to expose his pattern of manipulation and seek justice.

name: 4K-AMZ - Octopus! (2025) (US)
plot: This is a documentary about being murdered by your lover, getting lost in Mexico, finding a unicorn, a competitive quilter, Tracy Morgan, and exploring our connection with a possible alien. In other words, it's a documentary about the octopus. Narrated by Phoebe Waller-Bridge.
cast: Phoebe Waller-Bridge

name: 4K-AMZ - The Not Very Grand Tour (2025) (GB)
plot: Richard Hammond and James May look back at nostalgic clips of The Grand Tour.
cast: James May, Richard Hammond, Jeremy Clarkson

name: 4K-AMZ - Spy High (2025) (US)
plot: When teenager Blake Robbins files a lawsuit claiming his school is spying on him, it sparks a wild scandal with alarming digital privacy implications.
cast: Blake Robbins

name: 4K-AMZ - Real Madrid: Cómo no te voy a querer (2025) (ES)
plot: Sports docuseries that reviews Real Madrid's 2023-2024 season. At Real Madrid, the ambition and demand to win every title puts managers, coaching staff and players to the test every year. In the 2023-24 season, the team was reinforced to form a squad up to the challenge: to complete a decade that can turn the team into a legend and write a new golden page for the club in the history of soccer. However, barely at the beginning of La Liga, the team loses two of its most important players for the rest of the season, straining the resources of the defense. The coaching staff's solutions are stretched to the limit when two other first-team players also suffer serious injuries soon after and the success of the project multiplies the challenge.
cast: Carlo Ancelotti, Jude Bellingham, Vinícius Júnior, Thibaut Courtois, Toni Kroos, Luka Modrić, Rodrygo Goes, Joselu

name: 4K-AMZ - Molly Mae: Behind It All (2025) (GB)
plot: Go beyond the headlines to uncover the real Molly-Mae, following her journey after her highly publicised break-up and adapting to the challenges of motherhood, all while preparing to launch her biggest business venture to date: ‘Maebe’.
cast: Molly-Mae Hague

name: 4K-AMZ - Dinner Club (2021) (IT)
plot: Michelin-starred chef Carlo Cracco undertakes six trips across Italy to rediscover its most authentic cuisine with famous actors for each destination.
cast: Carlo Cracco, Luciana Littizzetto, Sabrina Ferilli

name: 4K-AMZ - A Team Called SPAIN: The Road to the Fourth Win (2024) (ES)
plot: 'A Team Called Spain' is the intimate account of a national team that has been the protagonist of one of the most surprising feats in the history of Spanish sport. Through four vibrant episodes, the frenetic pace of the competition and the coexistence of footballers with very different personalities converge in a story that takes your breath away.

name: 4K-AMZ - Medina: The Celebrity Scammer (2024) (ES)
plot: Jorge Ponce sets out to try and discover the identity of "Medina," a mysterious character who has spent the last 20 years scamming dozens of TV personalities by pretending to be a former colleague with a personal drama.
cast: Jorge Ponce, Andreu Buenafuente, Miguel Rellán, Carlos Areces, Berto Romero, Kira Miró, Joaquín Reyes

name: 4K-AMZ - The Grand Tour (2016) (GB)
plot: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May are back with a show about adventure, excitement and friendship... as long as you accept that the people you call friends are also the ones you find extremely annoying. Sometimes it's even a show about cars. Follow them on their global adventure.
cast: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond, James May
director: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond, James May

name: 4K-AMZ - The Money Game (2024) (US)
plot: Name, Image, and Likeness has turned many college athletes into celebrities. But fame and fortune won't shield them from the pressure of competition. Social media phenom and gymnast Olivia Dunne longs to win a championship in her senior year. Meanwhile, quarterback Jayden Daniels has his NFL dreams and the hopes of all Louisiana on his shoulders ahead of a showdown with archrival Alabama.

name: 4K-AMZ - Clarkson's Farm (2021) (GB)
plot:
Follow Jeremy Clarkson as he embarks on his latest adventure, farming. The man who on several occasions claims to be allergic to manual labour takes on the most manually labour intensive job there is. What could possibly go wrong?
عام حافل وشاق ومضحك في كثير من الأحيان في حياة المزارع البريطاني الأكثر احتمالاً ، جيريمي كلاركسون. انضم إلى جيريمي وفريقه من زملائه الزراعيين وهم يواجهون خلفية الطقس غير المفيد والحيوانات العصية والمحاصيل غير المستجيبة والوباء غير المتوقع. هذا هو جيريمي كلاركسون كما لم تره من قبل.
cast: Jeremy Clarkson, Kaleb Cooper, Charlie Ireland

name: 4K-AMZ - Dead in the Water
plot: A young British couple's dream trip through remote Central America, turns into a chilling nightmare when they are brutally murdered and the trail for their killer goes cold. Four decades later, failed by law enforcement, their family take up the manhunt and make a shocking discovery.

name: 4K-AMZ - Love Storiyaan
plot:
Six real life couples relive their unique love stories in this heartfelt series celebrating the triumph of love against all odds.
يسترجع ستة أزواج من الحياة الواقعية قصص حبهم الفريدة في هذا المسلسل المؤثر الذي يحتفل بانتصار الحب على التحيز. استنادًا إلى قصص من مشروع الحب الهندي.

name: 4K-AMZ - Wedding.con
plot:
Wedding.con is a true crime documentary series about five women who seek to fulfill a universal dream - Marriage. However, in their search for the perfect life-partner, they end up getting exploited financially and emotionally by conmen with fake identities, posing as suitable grooms on popular online platforms.

عبارة عن سلسلة وثائقية عن جريمة حقيقية تدور أحداثها حول خمس نساء يسعين لتحقيق حلم عالمي - الزواج. ومع ذلك، أثناء بحثهم عن شريك الحياة المثالي، ينتهي بهم الأمر بالتعرض للاستغلال المالي والعاطفي من قبل المحتالين ذوي الهويات المزيفة، الذين يتظاهرون بأنهم عرسان مناسبون على منصات الإنترنت الشهيرة.
cast: Sandeep Soman, Pragati Mishra, Swati Verma

name: 4K-AMZ - Lore
plot:
This anthology series brings to life Aaron Mahnke's “Lore” podcast and uncovers the real-life events that spawned our darkest nightmares. Blending dramatic scenes, animation, archive and narration, Lore reveals how our horror legends - such as vampires, werewolves and body snatchers - are rooted in truth.

مبني على بودكاست الرعب الشهير والحائز على جوائز متعددة، مسلسل أنثولوجي يقدم في كل حلقة قصة رعب مختلفة.
cast: Aaron Mahnke

name: 4K-AMZ - Dance Life
plot:
Follow a select group of students throughout their final make-or-break year at Australia's elite dance Studio, Brent Street.

يتتبع Dance Life الرحلة الرائعة لطلاب Brent Street Academy خلال سنتهم الأخيرة، حيث يسعون جاهدين ليصبحوا راقصين تجاريين محترفين. من الساعين إلى الكمال إلى المعجزات، ومن المستضعفين إلى المستحقين، فإن رحلة الجميع فريدة من نوعها.
cast: Cassie Bartho, Lucas Newland, Tiana Vassallo, Arabella Meleo, Conor Bann-Murray, Archer Rose, Kim Naylor, Emily Smith

name: 4K-AMZ - Jorik
plot:
Jorik (Lil’ Kleine) wordt in 2021 gecanceld na beschuldigingen van mishandeling van zijn ex-vriendin. Hoe is het sindsdien met hem gegaan? In deze driedelige documentaire horen we voor het eerst Jorik's kant van het verhaal, komen alle problemen aan bod waarmee hij wordt geconfronteerd en krijgen we een unieke inkijk in Jorik's controversiële leven.

سيتم إلغاء Jorik (Lil 'Kleine) في عام 2021 بعد اتهامات بالاعتداء على صديقته السابقة. كيف كان حاله منذ ذلك الحين؟ في هذا الفيلم الوثائقي المكون من ثلاثة أجزاء، نسمع لأول مرة جانب يوريك من القصة، وتتم مناقشة جميع المشكلات التي يواجهها، ونحصل على نظرة فريدة لحياة يوريك المثيرة للجدل.
cast: Lil' Kleine, Nova Scholten, Maarten Scholten, Julien Willemsen, Jonna Fraser, Boef, SFB, Ronnie Flex

name: 4K-AMZ - James May: Our Man in…
plot: James May embarks on a remarkable journey across Japan, from its icy north to its balmy south. He’ll see the sights, meet the locals, and eat the noodles in a bid to truly understand the Land of the Rising Sun.
cast: James May

name: 4K-AMZ - Coach Prime
plot: Follow the 2022 Jackson State University Tigers football team at practice and during games, in the locker room, off the field, and in the community, throughout their 12-0, undefeated SWAC Championship season.
cast: Deion Sanders

name: 4K-AMZ - American Playboy: The Hugh Hefner Story
plot: A fascinating docuseries chronicling Playboy magazine’s charismatic founder, Hugh Hefner, and his impact on global culture. Told from his unique perspective with never-before-seen footage from his private archive, discover the captivating story about the man behind the bunny.
cast: Hugh Hefner, Matt Whelan, Shara Connolly, Joy Buckle, Adam Jonas Segaller, Ella Becroft, Laura Thompson, Ian Bell

name: 4K-AMZ - Borat’s American Lockdown & Debunking Borat
plot: Live the real-life drama of Sacha Baron Cohen, as Borat Sagdivev, where he spends five days at the peak of the Covid-19 pandemic with two conspiracy theorists. Then, in Debunking Borat, see the two conspiracy theorists have their theories debunked by some of the world’s leading experts.
cast: Sacha Baron Cohen, Maria Bakalova

name: 4K-AMZ - Jean-Claude Van Johnson
plot: Jean-Claude Van Damme is a global martial arts & film sensation, also operating under the simple alias of "Johnson" as the world's best undercover private contractor. Retired for years, a chance encounter with a lost love brings him back to the game. This time, he'll be deadlier than ever. Probably.
cast: Jean-Claude Van Damme, Kat Foster, Bar Paly, Phylicia Rashād, Moisés Arias

name: 4K-AMZ - Le Mans: Racing Is Everything
plot: The 24 Hours of Le Mans is a motor race like no other. Taking place in France each year, it is an endurance test for drivers and cars that literally takes 24 hours to complete. Traveling from Kuala Lumpur to the Côte D’Azur, shot in breathtaking 4K and with unprecedented access to six of the teams competing for glory, Le Mans: Racing is Everything is motorsport as you’ve never seen it before.
cast: Louis Mellis, Darren Cox, André Lotterer, Jann Mardenborough, Mark Webber

name: 4K-AMZ - Wild Isles
plot: This nature documentary introduces viewers to the fauna and flora of Britain and Ireland across four main areas: woodlands, grasslands, freshwater and marine.
cast: David Attenborough

name: 4K-AMZ - The Ride
plot: The world's top bull riders juggle their families, faith, and a modern-day cowboy lifestyle as they compete for the inaugural team series championship.
cast: Ezekiel "Blue" Mitchell, Chase Outlaw, José Vitor Leme, Boudreaux Campbell, Michael Gaffney, Sean Gleason, JJ Gottsch, Dakota Louis

name: 4K-AMZ - This Is Football
plot: An emotionally-charged, six-part documentary, exploring football's extraordinary impact on the world. From the streets of Delhi to the fields of post-war Rwanda to the pitches of the Champions League, this globe-spanning series tells a unique story of the game and its power to unite countries, inspire generations and captivate billions.
cast: Pierluigi Collina, Juan Mata, Lionel Messi, Pep Guardiola, Oliver Kahn

name: 4K-AMZ - Surf Girls Hawai'i
plot: The next generation of Native Hawaiian female surfers compete at elite levels to earn a coveted spot on the World Tour of professional Surfing. This 4 part series offers behind the scenes access as they train, navigate family responsibilities and battle against the highest ranking surfers to get to the top of the podium.
cast: Moana Jones Wong, Ewe Wong, Maluhia Kinimaka, Pua DeSoto, Brianna Cope

name: 4K-AMZ - The Last Narc
plot: In 1985, American DEA agent Enrique “Kiki” Camarena was kidnapped, tortured, and murdered by Mexico’s most notorious drug lords. Thirty-five years later, three former cartel insiders share unprecedented details. This is the story of Camarena, the drug cartel he infiltrated, and the narc who risked everything to discover the truth.
cast: Hector Berrellez, Geneva Camarena, Jorge Godoy, Phil Jordan, Ramón Lira, Manny Madrano, Rene Lopez

name: 4K-AMZ - The Gymkhana Files
plot: Follow globally recognized race car driver and viral star Ken Block and his team of Hoonigans as they attempt to make the greatest automotive video of all time while racing in the World Rallycross Championship.

name: 4K-AMZ - The Fake Sheikh
plot: This three-part documentary series unveils how Mazher used false identities to expose sports stars, politicians, and other celebrities in order to rise to fame. However, the very same thing caused a drastic downfall in his career and life when he was convicted of breaking the law and imprisoned for 15 months.

name: 4K-AMZ - 007: Road to a Million
plot: Nine pairs of everyday people are unleashed on an epic global adventure through a series of Bond inspired challenges, for a shot at winning a life-changing £1,000,000 prize. The Controller, Brian Cox, is the mastermind behind the game, watching the pairs as they hunt for 10 questions he’s hidden around the world.
cast: Brian Cox
